headline: EQUAL FLEXX APPROVED BY UPS FOLLOWING TWO-YEAR EVALUATION
summary: UPS has officially approved EQUAL FLEXX as part of its 2026 Tire Solutions Program, following a comprehensive two-year field evaluation across multiple commercial tire dealers nationwide.

raw.headline: EQUAL FLEXX APPROVED BY UPS FOLLOWING TWO-YEAR EVALUATION

headline: Amazon overtakes USPS as top delivery provider by volume: report
summary: The e-commerce giant delivered 6.7 billion packages last year, narrowly usurping the Postal Service, according to ShipMatrix.

raw.headline: Amazon overtakes USPS as top delivery provider by volume: report
raw.summary: The e-commerce giant delivered 6.7 billion packages last year, narrowly usurping the Postal Service, according to ShipMatrix.
